prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical modern football superstar collectible poster for a Spanish teenage prodigy, with hyper-realistic action photography, explosive 3D depth, light data-profile overlays, and a career timeline.

Canvas: Tall portrait poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, high-resolution sports magazine cover style. Background is a packed football stadium under bright daylight, with a slight architectural roof grid and dramatic motion blur. Use red, gold, black, and white as the dominant palette, with glowing gold HUD lines and sparks.

Main subject: Center a hyper-realistic young male footballer in a red Spain-inspired kit with yellow stripes, red socks, and football boots, captured from a low-angle wide-lens perspective while lunging forward and striking a ball with his left foot. Make the legs and ball exaggerated by perspective, with the boot and ball close to camera, motion blur on the ball, golden speed trails, grass particles, and cinematic stadium lighting. The player's face is intentionally covered by a flat brown square censor block, while curly brown hair remains visible above it.

Top headline text: Huge distressed bold Chinese title across the top: 西班牙天才新星. Under it, add a smaller red subtitle with divider lines: 左脚新核 · 灵动突破 · 少年锋芒.

Left-side info cards: Add exactly 3 stacked black-and-gold beveled cards on the left, each with an icon and Chinese copy:
1. Building icon, title “拉玛西亚起点”, lines “天赋初现” and “梦想启航”.
2. Stadium icon, title “一线队登场”, lines “少年亮相” and “未来已来”.
3. Star icon, title “西班牙新星”, lines “红色血脉” and “荣耀传承”.

Right-side analysis cards: Add exactly 4 stacked black-and-gold beveled cards on the right, each with small sports-data graphics:
1. Running-player icon, title “左脚突破特质”, lines “内切利刃” and “掌控节奏”, with a small golden line chart.
2. Goal/net icon, title “关键进球”, lines “冷静致命” and “一击制胜”, with a small bar chart.
3. Dribbling-player icon, title “关键传球”, lines “洞察空间” and “精准输送”, with a small line graph.
4. Pitch/heatmap icon, title “边路创造力”, lines “撕开防线” and “制造威胁”, with a glowing heat spot.

Extra HUD graphics: On the left-middle background place a faint tactical football diagram with circles, arrows, passing routes, and grid lines. Near the lower-left place a black-and-gold hexagonal badge with an upward chart icon and the text “未来可期”, framed by laurel leaves.

Bottom timeline: Add a horizontal glowing career timeline with exactly 5 milestones from left to right, each marked by a circular node and Chinese labels:
1. “8岁” / “启蒙” / “足球梦想” / “开启”.
2. “12岁” / “拉玛西亚” / “潜力新星” / “崭露头角”.
3. “16岁” / “一线队登场” / “正式亮相” / “备受瞩目”.
4. “18岁” / “关键时刻” / “决定比赛” / “挺身而出”.
5. “未来” / “无限可能” / “新核崛起” / “闪耀世界”.

Footer: Add a dark navy and red angular ribbon footer with gold decorative slashes and the centered Chinese title: 新生代巨星破框档案.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic sports action composite, dynamic foreshortening, premium poster design, Chinese typography, distressed headline texture, black translucent data panels with gold outlines, glowing golden motion streaks, subtle red accents, crisp UI elements, cinematic color grading, dramatic depth, energetic collectible-card atmosphere.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 left info cards, exactly 4 right analysis cards, exactly 5 timeline milestones, and one lower-left hexagonal badge. Keep all text in Chinese exactly as specified unless customized. Do not add logos, watermarks, or real club badges.
